content.text:
I don’t see the stable reference text yet. Please paste the text here or upload it, and I’ll summarize it.

If you want, tell me:
- Summary length (e.g., 1 sentence, 5 bullets, or a short paragraph)
- What to emphasize (main ideas, methods, results, dates, implications)
- Any terms or sections to preserve verbatim

Notes:
- I’ll treat the provided text as the base context for this chat and summarize accordingly.
- If the text is long, I can summarize in parts or provide a concise overview plus a detailed section-by-section summary.
